parameters-en.Wave: Choose from 8 different analog monophonic synth lead sounds.
parameters-en.Filter: Controls a low pass filter that removes some high end from the synth signal.
parameters-en.Decay: Controls the decay of the Filter's envelope.
parameters-en.Mix: Controls the blend between the synth and the dry signal. At 0%, no synth is heard; at 100%, no dry signal is heard.
parameters-en.Level: Sets the overall level of the block.
